arts.ttl: Alan Shearer doesn't hold back in rant on 'weak' Man City after Feyenoord embarrassment
arts.sum: Manchester City’s crisis continued in their Champions League clash against Feyenoord after racing into a 3-0 lead against the Dutch side only to be pegged back after a late collapse

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer launches scathing attack on Man City with damning three-word verdict after Feyenoord
arts.sum: Manchester City news as Alan Shearer hammers Pep Guardiola's side for Champions League draw to Feyenoord after late three goal collapse

arts.ttl: Man City set Champions League record with EMBARRASSING Feyenoord collapse
arts.sum: In the process, Man City have made Champions League history by becoming the first team to lead a match by three goals as late as the 75th minute and still fail to win. Manchester City have become the first team in Champions League history to blow a three-goal lead inside the final 15 minutes of a match in the competition.

arts.ttl: Josko Gvardiol’s Man City disasterclass snatches ignominy from the jaws of victory
arts.sum: Manchester City 3-3 Feyenoord: Pep Guardiola’s team were cruising towards a long-awaited win and yet somehow contrived to throw away a three-goal lead with 16 minutes remaining

arts.ttl: Feyenoord unusual celebration adds to Liverpool FC taunt for sorry Man City
arts.sum: Manchester City were strolling to a 3-0 win against Feyenoord, only to self-destruct in the final 15 minutes and draw

arts.ttl: Man City 3-3 Feyenoord: Player ratings as Cityzens collapse in stunning fashion
arts.sum: Player ratings from Man City 3-3 Feyenoord in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Man City 3-3 Feyenoord: Match report & talking points from shocking Champions League draw
arts.sum: Match report & talking points from Man City's 3-3 draw with Feyenoord.

arts.ttl: Man City crisis continues as Feyenoord come from three down to draw
arts.sum: The extraordinary turnaround leaves Pep Guardiola’s side winless in six games.

arts.ttl: Man City throw away three-goal lead in embarrassing Feyenoord collapse as crisis escalates
arts.sum: MAN CITY 3-3 FEYENOORD: Erling Haaland's record-breaking scoring rate looked set to secure a comfortable win only for Pep Guardiola's men only to collapse in an surprising collapse

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland's class only shines light on glaring Man City problem
arts.sum: Manchester City suffered a late collapse against Feyenoord to let a three-goal lead slip in the final 15 minutes and draw 3-3, cancelling out Erling Haaland's brace
